runners.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 457m. Last start finished 7th on April 9 over 520m at Wentworth Park behind Deep Space beaten 21 lengths (31.12) in a Grade 5. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.

runners.formComment: Impressive performance to post a big 4.5 lengths victory in a Mix 6/7 last start at Warragul, recording a flying 22.38 over the 400m journey. Top win and looms as a strong winning chance.

runners.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Warragul to win by a neck in 26.18, beating Head Of Staff. Last start finished 5th in a Rank Limit - Restricted Win on January 21 over 600m at The Meadows behind Yaya Sally beaten 7 lengths (35.24). Can't recommend against this lot.
